findings.evidence: Local lines 93-104 prove only `P.toSubmodule.zero_mem/add_mem/smul_mem`; Mathlib already has `Submodule.zero_mem`, `Submodule.add_mem`, and `Submodule.smul_mem` at `mathlib/Mathlib/Algebra/Module/Submodule/Defs.lean:208`, `:211`, and `:214`.
findings.fix: Remove these wrappers; users can apply `P.toSubmodule.zero_mem`, `P.toSubmodule.add_mem`, and `P.toSubmodule.smul_mem` directly, or add a real `SetLike`/coercion API first if the goal is membership in `P` itself.
findings.issue: `Subcomodule.zero_mem`, `add_mem`, and `smul_mem` duplicate the general `Submodule` closure API for the special expression `P.toSubmodule`.

summary: The stability predicate itself is at the expected level, but the file adds subcomodule-specific closure lemmas that are just special cases of the existing `Submodule` API.
